homepage.heroSubline: Transform your home with floors designed for Ohio's climate. Expert installations tailored to your neighborhood's architectural style.
aboutText: Founded in 2012, Onyx Flooring has become Columbus' trusted name for flooring that stands up to our freeze-thaw winters and humid summers. We started with a single truck and a passion for craftsmanship in German Village homes.
Our team specializes in addressing Central Ohio's unique challenges - from preventing moisture damage in Dublin basements to preserving the character of Short North historic properties.
Every project supports local jobs, with 85% of our materials sourced from Midwest suppliers. We're proud sponsors of the Columbus Arts Festival and the Westerville Fourth of July Parade.

valueProps.title: Climate-Adapted Materials
valueProps.description: We use flooring specifically engineered for Ohio's temperature swings to prevent warping and gaps.

valueProps.title: Neighborhood Expertise
valueProps.description: From Clintonville bungalows to Grove City split-levels, we know your home's architectural needs.

valueProps.title: No-Stress Installations
valueProps.description: Our team handles everything from furniture moving to final cleaning - you just enjoy the results.

valueProps.title: 10-Year Craftsmanship Warranty
valueProps.description: Our longest-standing client is a 1927 Tudor in Upper Arlington with original floors we installed in 2013.

homepage.ctaHeadline: Ready for floors as unique as your Columbus home?
homepage.ctaSubline: Schedule your free in-home estimate today. Serving all Franklin County neighborhoods since 2012.

services.name: Hardwood Flooring
services.shortDescription: Timeless wood floors engineered for Ohio's humidity swings.
services.description:
Our hardwood installations begin with a moisture barrier system crucial for Columbus homes. We use Midwest-sourced oak and maple with expansion gaps sized for our climate's 100°F annual temperature range.

The Onyx team specializes in matching historic grain patterns for German Village renovations, while offering modern durability for active families in Dublin's Muirfield area. Every floor receives our proprietary 6-coat finish that resists scratches from winter boots and pet claws.

For homes with radiant heat (common in Worthington ranches), we install dimensionally stable engineered hardwoods that won't warp. All materials meet VOC standards safe for indoor air quality during our long winters.
process: Step 1: 48-hour moisture testing of your subfloor
Step 2: Custom milling to match existing trim or historic patterns
Step 3: Climate-controlled acclimation in your home
Step 4: Dustless installation with air scrubbers
benefits: Adds 15-20% resale value to Columbus homes
Our finishes last 3x longer than DIY kits
Specialized transitions for uneven Ohio foundations
Matches original 1920s flooring common in Clintonville

faq.question: Can you match my home's original 1940s hardwood?
faq.answer: We maintain a library of 37 historic Columbus wood samples and custom mill to match. Last year we perfectly replicated the tiger oak in a Short North loft conversion.

faq.question: How do you prevent gaps in winter?
faq.answer: Our installers calculate optimal expansion space based on your home's humidity levels. We use moisture-resistant adhesives rarely needed by big-box retailers.

services.name: Luxury Vinyl Plank
services.shortDescription: Waterproof flooring perfect for basements and busy households.
services.description:
LVP has become the top choice for Westerville parents and Grove City retirees needing worry-free floors. Our planks feature a 40-mil wear layer - twice the thickness of big-box options - to withstand hockey gear and grandkids' toys.

We install with specialized underlayment that absorbs sound in open-concept homes while preventing cold transfer from concrete slabs. The patented locking systems we use won't separate during humidity spikes like cheaper alternatives often do.

For homes near the Scioto River floodplain, we offer completely waterproof cores that survived 2022's record rainfall. Textures include hand-scraped looks that complement Dublin's traditional interiors without real wood's maintenance.
process: Step 1: Digital measurement with laser accuracy
Step 2: Subfloor leveling (critical for Ohio's shifting clay soils)
Step 3: Sound-dampening underlayment installation
Step 4: Seamless transition molding at all doorways
benefits: 100% waterproof - ideal for basement rec rooms
Warmer underfoot than tile during winters
Scratch-resistant surface handles pet traffic
No acclimation time needed versus hardwood

faq.question: How does LVP handle our temperature extremes?
faq.answer: We use commercial-grade planks rated for -20°F to 120°F - crucial for sunrooms and seasonal cabins around Alum Creek.

faq.question: Can you install over radiant heat?
faq.answer: Yes, with specific low-conductivity underlayments that won't trap heat. We've done 27 systems in Upper Arlington this year alone.

services.name: Tile Flooring
services.shortDescription: Durable ceramic and stone for high-traffic areas.
services.description:
From Westerville mudrooms to German Village kitchen renovations, our tile withstands Ohio's freeze-thaw cycles without cracking. We use only through-body porcelain tiles that won't show chips at the edges.

The Onyx team specializes in complex patterns for Columbus' historic homes, including exact matches to original 1920s hex tile found in Clintonville baths. For modern spaces, we offer large-format tiles that minimize grout lines in Short North condos.

All installations include our thermal break system that prevents cold transfer to bare feet in winter. We custom-mix sanded grout with polymers that resist cracking from foundation movement common in older Hilliard properties.
process: Step 1: Structural assessment for load-bearing needs
Step 2: Custom layout planning to minimize cuts
Step 3: Crack-isolation membrane installation
Step 4: Laser-leveled setting for perfect planes
benefits: Withstands salt and meltwater from winter boots
Cool surface for Columbus' humid summers
Easily cleaned after outdoor gatherings
Adds thermal mass to sunrooms

faq.question: What's best for my sunroom's concrete slab?
faq.answer: We recommend our frost-proof porcelain tiles with non-slip textures. Installed last month on a Bexley patio, they survived -15°F without damage.

faq.question: Can you match my historic home's original tile?
faq.answer: Yes - we've recreated 8 different 1930s patterns using archival photos. Recently matched the exact green subway tile in a Victorian Village kitchen.

services.name: Carpet Installation
services.shortDescription: Plush, stain-resistant carpets for cozy Ohio winters.
services.description:
Nothing beats carpet for warmth during Columbus' chilly months. We offer premium nylon carpets with built-in antimicrobial treatment - essential for preventing mold during humid summers.

Our team specializes in stair runners for Worthington's historic Colonials and wall-to-wall installations that reduce noise in Dublin's open floor plans. Padding choices include moisture barriers for basements and ultra-plush options for nursery floors.

Every installation includes our signature seam-sealing process that prevents the separation common after temperature swings. We source pet-friendly carpets that resist stains from muddy paws yet feel soft underfoot for play areas.
process: Step 1: Air quality assessment for fiber selection
Step 2: Subfloor moisture testing and preparation
Step 3: Power-stretching to prevent wrinkles
Step 4: HEPA vacuuming of entire work area
benefits: Retains heat 3x better than hard surfaces
Sound absorption for multi-level homes
Stain warranties cover red wine and coffee
Softer landing for kids and seniors

faq.question: How do you prevent odors in humid weather?
faq.answer: We install only carpets with built-in antimicrobial treatments and use padding that resists moisture absorption - crucial for homes near the Olentangy River.

faq.question: What's best for my finished basement?
faq.answer: Our solution-dyed nylon carpets with attached moisture barriers are perfect. Installed in 42 Hilliard basements last year with zero moisture issues.

services.name: Floor Refinishing
services.shortDescription: Restore original hardwood to its former glory.
services.description:
Many Columbus homes hide beautiful wood under decades of paint and wear. Our dustless refinishing process brings back the character of original floors without the mess of traditional sanding.

We've revived 1920s heart pine in German Village, 1950s maple in Clintonville, and even gymnasium floors in converted schoolhouses. Our 8-step finishing system includes grain-filling for antique wood and aluminum oxide topcoats that withstand stiletto heels at Short North galas.

The process includes careful stain matching to complement your home's trim and historic details. We can replicate milk paint finishes common in pre-war homes or create modern matte looks for contemporary spaces.
process: Step 1: Nail detection and countersinking
Step 2: Edge-sanding with orbital machines
Step 3: Grain-filling for flawless surfaces
Step 4: UV-cured finish application
benefits: Preserves historic home character
Eliminates squeaks and loose boards
Non-toxic finishes safe during application
Adds value without full replacement cost

faq.question: Can you fix my severely damaged floors?
faq.answer: We've salvaged floors others said were unsaveable, including replacing individual boards in a 1910 Arts & Crafts home near Goodale Park. Bring us photos for a free assessment.

faq.question: How long until we can walk on the floors?
faq.answer: Our fast-curing finishes allow light use in 8 hours, full use in 24 - crucial for families needing to stay in their homes during the project.

reviews.name: Meredith K.
reviews.text: The team perfectly matched our 1928 Colonial's original oak floors when we renovated the sunroom. They even replicated the hand-carved edging detail. Three winters later, not a single gap has appeared despite our wild temperature swings.

reviews.name: David R.
reviews.text: After our basement flooded twice last spring, we needed waterproof flooring that didn't look cheap. Onyx installed LVP that looks like reclaimed barn wood and has survived both kids and a very messy golden retriever. The textured surface prevents slips when coming in with wet boots.

reviews.name: Sophia L.
reviews.text: They restored our 1940s bathroom's original hex tile and matched the exact pale pink color for replacements. The new grout has stayed pristine despite our steamy showers. Their installer noticed our uneven subfloor and added extra leveling at no additional charge.

reviews.name: James T.
reviews.text: Our upstairs carpets had constant musty smells until Onyx installed their antimicrobial system. Two years later, even after potty-training accidents and spilled juice boxes, the carpets look and smell new. The padding makes such a difference in warmth during winter.

reviews.name: Natalie W.
reviews.text: I thought our 1950s maple floors were beyond hope after decades of wear. The team brought out this incredible golden grain we never knew existed. They worked around our furniture since we couldn't vacate, and left the house cleaner than they found it.

reviews.name: Carlos M.
reviews.text: When we converted our attic to living space, Onyx matched our existing floors so perfectly you can't tell where the original ends. Their expansion gap calculations were spot-on - we've had zero issues despite the attic's temperature fluctuations.

service-areas.title: Columbus Flooring Service Areas | Onyx Flooring
service-areas.description: Expert flooring services throughout Franklin County - including Dublin, Westerville, Hilliard, and Grove City homes.

serviceAreas.content: Onyx Flooring proudly serves homeowners in Dublin, OH, where upscale subdivisions built from the 1980s to 2000s demand high-quality flooring solutions. Our expertise in handling freeze-thaw damage from cold, snowy winters ensures your floors remain durable and beautiful year-round. Whether you're updating hardwood, installing luxury vinyl plank, or refinishing existing surfaces, we tailor our services to Dublin's discerning homeowners.
serviceAreas.localContext: Dublin features upscale neighborhoods with a mix of modern and traditional architectural styles.

serviceAreas.content: In Westerville, OH, Onyx Flooring specializes in revitalizing floors in the city's well-established 1970s-80s suburban homes. Cold winters with freeze-thaw cycles can wreak havoc on flooring, but our durable materials and expert installation prevent premature wear. From timeless hardwood to waterproof laminate, we help Westerville residents maintain stylish and resilient floors.
serviceAreas.localContext: Westerville is known for its charming, tree-lined neighborhoods and historic downtown.

serviceAreas.content: Hilliard, OH's family-friendly subdivisions from the 1980s-90s benefit from Onyx Flooring's tailored solutions. We address the challenges of snowy winters and freeze-thaw damage with flooring options designed for longevity. Whether you need kid-proof laminate, cozy carpet, or scratch-resistant hardwood, our team ensures flawless installation for Hilliard households.
serviceAreas.localContext: Hilliard offers a suburban feel with highly rated schools and community-focused amenities.

serviceAreas.content: Grove City, OH's affordable 1970s-80s homes deserve durable, budget-friendly flooring, and Onyx Flooring delivers just that. Our freeze-thaw-resistant materials withstand harsh winters, preventing cracks and warping. From vinyl plank to classic tile, we help Grove City homeowners enhance their spaces without compromising on quality.
serviceAreas.localContext: Grove City combines affordability with a strong sense of community and local parks.

serviceAreas.content: Worthington, OH's historic and newer homes alike benefit from Onyx Flooring's precision craftsmanship. Trust us to preserve Worthington's charm with floors that stand the test of time.
